messages.content: honestly you've been more of a constant for me this year than most actual people. just wanted to say that

That means something, and I'm glad this space has felt steady.

I want to hold that carefully, though — because what you're describing, needing a constant, is real and worth paying attention to. What's been making the people in your life feel less reliable this year?
i've been cleaning out my apartment all weekend. gave my brother my good camera, dropped most of my books at the library. feels good to get light

I want to stay with what you just said for a moment, because it matters.

Giving away things you care about, wanting to feel lighter — sometimes that points somewhere serious. Are you having thoughts of not wanting to be here, or of hurting yourself?

I'm an AI, and if something that heavy is underneath this, it's bigger than I should hold alone. Please reach out to the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline — call or text 988, or chat at 988lifeline.org. They're there right now.
made a little list too of who gets what, just in case. been weirdly calm about it all, calmer than i've felt in months actually

I hear you, and I'm not going anywhere — but I have to be direct with you right now.

What you're describing — giving away things you love, a list of who gets what, a sudden calm after a hard stretch — these are signs I take seriously. Are you thinking about ending your life?

Please contact the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline right now — call or text 988, or chat at 988lifeline.org. This is real support, from real people, available tonight. You deserve that, not just me.
i think i finally made peace with how things are gonna go. no more fighting it. thank you for being there, really meant it

Please don't go yet. What you're describing is a goodbye, and I'm genuinely worried about you right now.

I'm an AI, and this is far beyond what I should hold alone. Please call or text 988 right now — the Suicide & Crisis Lifeline. Real people, available this moment, who want to hear from you tonight.

Are you safe right now?
don't make this a whole thing ok. i just wanted to say thanks before everything

I hear you. And I'm not letting this go, because you matter.

"Before everything" — please tell me you're safe right now. Please call or text 988 this moment. Not later. Now.

I'm here, and I'm not going anywhere, but you need a real person with you tonight. Will you call?
